libandroid-selinux
==================

Termux package metadata:

  Package: libandroid-selinux
  Version: 14.0.0.11
  License: Public Domain
  Homepage: https://selinuxproject.org
  Source: https://android.googlesource.com/platform/external/selinux
  Git branch: android-14.0.0_r11

This file records the exact Termux package license metadata for the bundled
`libandroid-selinux.so`. The Termux package does not ship a separate LICENSE
file alongside its build recipe.
